title: Just Another Zombie [JAZZ]
description: In this zombie apocalypse modpack, face relentless undead hordes with custom weapons and gear. Team up or go solo in a world where every decision matters
body:
*⚠️ **Work in Progress:** This modpack is still under development, and updates are on the horizon. Brace yourself for exciting upgrades and additions soon!*

![modpack title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1h7cNEYb/images/9f5fd9116c9258d44a5ec41ba872aae82b49ad36.png)


**Embark on a Symphony of Survival!**

Welcome to JAZZ, where the undead roam and every moment is a note in the haunting melody of survival. Explore the desolate beauty of abandoned cities, each holding secrets and resources crucial for your survival. Dance through the apocalypse with challenging zombie encounters that will test your skills and tactical finesse.

*Key Features:*

🏙️ **Abandoned Cities Awaken:** Delve into the heart of once-thriving metropolises, where every corner holds a story and every alley hides the key to your next move.

🧟‍♂️ **Zombie Symphony:** Encounter a diverse array of zombies, each a unique instrument in the orchestra of chaos. Adapt and strategize to the ever-changing beat of the apocalypse.

🔫 **Arsenal of Melody:** Arm yourself with an extensive collection of guns, turning each encounter into a mesmerizing dance of survival. Your weapons, your rhythm.

🌐 **Open-Ended Exploration:** Break free from the mundane—no need for vanilla routines. Immerse yourself in a world of endless possibilities, where creativity and exploration shape your destiny.

🎭 **RP or Casual Fun:** Craft your own narrative in a world that invites you to roleplay or simply have a blast with friends. JAZZ offers a canvas for your unique adventure.

*Survive the Rhythm, Embrace the Melody—This is JAZZ!* 🎶🌃💀

---

**Credits:** 

- [**Day Zombie Rebooted**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/day-zombies-rebooted)

- [**NineZero's Gun Expansion**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ninezeros-gun-expansion)
